description:
接棒提示词（给下一次新对话直接使用）：

你现在接手 Alpha-Insight，请严格执行以下要求：

1) 任务范围（只做 A，不做 B/C）
- 仅实现 升级2 文档中的阶段 A（Telegram 入站网关与命令协议）。
- 明确：只完成 A1/A2/A3；不要实现阶段 B（订阅模型/24h 调度）和阶段 C（可靠性治理）。

2) 不破坏现有业务流程（硬约束）
- 不得修改现有两个页面的默认业务流程：
  - ui/streamlit_dashboard.py
  - ui/llm_frontend.py
- 采用旁路新增：新增 gateway/router/actions/store，复用现有 workflow/scanner/telegram send 能力。
- 现有脚本与 UI 默认入口行为必须保持兼容。

3) A 阶段最小可交付（必须完成）
- A1 Bot Gateway（Webhook + Long polling 选其一先落地，建议先 long polling）
  - update_id 幂等落库（bot_updates unique）
  - webhook 模式需快速 ACK（若本轮实现 webhook）
- A2 命令路由
  - 至少支持：/analyze <symbol>、/help
  - 参数校验与错误提示
- A3 即时分析回推
  - 收到 /analyze 后先写 analysis_requests(status=queued)
  - 再触发 run_unified_research
  - 状态迁移：queued->running->completed/failed（可含 timeout）
  - 回执含 request_id，结果含 run_id

4) 数据与幂等要求（本轮 A 必须满足）
- analysis_requests(request_id unique, update_id, chat_id, payload, status, run_id, created_at, updated_at, last_error)
- 同一 request_id 不得重复进入 running/completed
- 输出可验证口径（SQL 或统计）

5) 测试要求（必须执行并在结果中汇报）
- 至少包含：
  - 命令解析单测（/analyze,/help,非法参数）
  - update_id 幂等测试（重复 update 不重复执行）
  - request_id 幂等测试（重复触发不重复跑研究）
- 运行：pytest -q（至少跑新增相关测试）
- 报告：给出关键测试结果和失败修复说明

6) 交付与收尾（必须完成）
- 仅提交本次相关文件，不混入保留脏改（.env/AGENTS.md/antigravity-awesome-skills/1.md 等）
- 按仓库要求收尾：
  - git pull --rebase（必要时 --autostash）
  - bd sync
  - git push
  - git status 确认 up to date

7) 完成定义（DoD）
- 不影响当前两页面正常运行
- Telegram /analyze 可完成“回执(request_id)->结果(run_id)”闭环
- 幂等与状态迁移可测试、可验证
- 测试通过并已推送

执行前先跑：
BD_ISSUE_PREFIX=Alpha-Insight bd --no-db ready

执行时请先 claim 本任务，再开始改动。

description: Follow-up from Alpha-Insight-118: repository environment still missing TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET_TOKEN, so final acceptance used local Telegram API mock. Need real bot token + webhook secret, configure allowlist, execute live Telegram command loop, and capture non-mock evidence.

description: Now Full Analysis runs in real Docker sandbox with --network none. Current coder script fetches yfinance inside container, which may fail due no network. Refactor Week2 flow to fetch data outside sandbox and pass records into sandbox code for deterministic offline execution.

description: Break phases A'/B'/C'/D' in 升级.md into actionable file-level beads tasks and embed issue mapping in doc.

title: A1 DataBundle schema and adapters
description: Stage A'. Define DataBundle fields and adapters in core/models.py and tools/market_data.py with serializer helpers.

title: A2 Week2 offline sandbox input refactor
description: Stage A'. Refactor agents/workflow_engine.py and agents/coder_engine.py to consume pre-fetched bundle records instead of in-sandbox network fetch.

title: A3 Sandbox template guardrails hardening
description: Stage A'. Enforce no-network/no-dynamic-install patterns in core/guardrails.py and coder templates; add tests in tests/test_week4_system.py.

title: A4 Offline regression and evidence pipeline
description: Stage A'. Add offline integration tests/scripts in tests/test_week2_workflow.py and scripts/test_full_loop.py and surface backend evidence in ui/llm_frontend.py.

title: B1 ResearchResult unified schema
description: Stage B'. Create unified ResearchResult schema in core/models.py (or dedicated schema file) with run_id/provenance/metrics fields.

title: B2 Merge full and fused compute backbone
description: Stage B'. Build unified orchestrator in agents/workflow_engine.py + agents/market_news_engine.py to output single object.

title: B3 UI tabs bind to single run object
description: Stage B'. Update ui/llm_frontend.py so Planning/Full/Fused tabs read one ResearchResult (same run_id).

title: B4 Request-symbol strong validation
description: Stage B'. Implement fail-fast symbol/request consistency check in ui/llm_frontend.py and helper validators.

title: C1 Unified watchlist scheduling
description: Stage C'. Consolidate periodic and event triggers in agents/scanner_engine.py and scripts/hourly_watchlist_scan.py.

title: C2 Alert snapshot persistence
description: Stage C'. Add alert trigger snapshot model/storage fields in core/models.py and scanner outputs.

title: C3 Triggered research on critical alerts
description: Stage C'. Wire critical alert path to auto-launch ResearchResult generation in agents/scanner_engine.py and workflow runner.

title: C4 Notification channel abstraction
description: Stage C'. Keep Telegram as first channel and abstract notifier interface in tools/telegram.py and dispatcher callsites.

title: D1 Runtime metrics instrumentation
description: Stage D'. Add success/fallback/latency/retry metrics in core/observability.py and execution nodes.

title: D2 Failure clustering pipeline
description: Stage D'. Implement failure taxonomy and clustering tags across workflow/scanner paths with aggregation utility.

title: D3 Threshold alarms and anomaly watch
description: Stage D'. Add threshold rules for fallback spike/failure spike/latency anomaly in scanner scheduler and dashboard alerts.

title: D4 Ops runbook and cold-start SOP
description: Stage D'. Document runbook in README.md and new docs/runbook.md for rebuild/ports/deps/permissions/data fallback.
